title: The Gravity Organ
tagline: Paint a pinboard instrument, drop marbles, and tilt your phone to conduct the melody.
holy_shit: You can literally lean your body and reroute gravity mid-fall to change the song in real time.
powered_by: requestAnimationFrame physics + collision-triggered Web Audio bells, steered by orientation sensors or manual tilt
agent_scenario: When you need a no-backend interactive instrument/game where physics drives sound and mobile tilt changes behavior live.
author: kody-w + Copilot
